title: Pink Ball Day
subtitle: 水水和爸爸的运动周末：拍球、滑梯和勇敢说出来
theme: 周末亲子运动与勇敢表达
moral: 练习会让自己一点点进步；遇到小问题时，可以勇敢、清楚地说出来。

pages.narration: 周末的太阳暖暖的，窗外的小树轻轻摇。妈妈看见水水抱着粉粉的篮球，笑了。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 天气真好，我们下楼去小广场拍会儿球吧。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 好呀！我要带我的粉色篮球！

pages.composition_hint: A sunny apartment living room, shuishui holding a basketball with alternating pink and lavender-purple panels, an adult white rabbit in a yellow flower dress standing by the window, a red panda near the door with a small backpack.

pages.narration: 水水和爸爸走到楼下，还没到小广场，水水的小脑袋已经有新主意了。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 要不我们骑摩托车去公园投篮吧！

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 篮框很高哦，我们先去看看，有机会就试试。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui walking beside a red panda on a clean neighborhood path, shuishui carrying a pink-and-lavender basketball, trees and apartment buildings in the background.

pages.narration: 爸爸把篮球放进前车筐，水水坐在前面的小座椅上。小摩托“突突突”，向公园出发啦。
pages.composition_hint: A small pastel step-through underbone scooter with a front basket and a front-mounted small passenger seat; shuishui sits in the front seat wearing a small helmet, a red panda rides behind wearing a helmet, the pink-and-lavender basketball rests in the basket.

pages.narration: 到了公园，四个高高的篮框下面都很热闹。熊、狼、鹿和猴子哥哥们正在打比赛。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 看，大家都在比赛呢。我们就在旁边拍球吧。

pages.composition_hint: An outdoor basketball court with four tall hoops, a taller young bear, young wolf, young deer, and young monkey playing a friendly game on the court; shuishui and a red panda stand at the sideline with the pink-and-lavender basketball.

pages.narration: 水水站在场边的小空地上，开始一下一下拍球。咚、咚、咚……她连着拍了二十下！
pages.composition_hint: shuishui smiling proudly while dribbling a basketball with alternating pink and lavender-purple panels on a flat rubberized sport surface, a red panda standing nearby and clapping.

pages.narration: 拍完球，爸爸和水水练习传球。球飞过去，又飞回来，像一只圆圆的小鸟。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui and a red panda practicing chest passes beside an outdoor basketball court, the pink-and-lavender basketball in midair between them, friendly players blurred in the distance.

pages.narration: 玩了一会儿，水水的小腿有点累了。她和爸爸坐下来，看哥哥们打球，还吃了一块香香的饼干。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 我们补充一点能量，再去玩别的。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui (a white rabbit with a small round fluffy white rabbit tail — NOT a striped or ringed tail) and ONE red panda sit together on a wooden park bench; shuishui holds a small cookie, the pink-and-lavender basketball rests on the ground beside the bench. Only the red panda has a long ringed bushy tail; the rabbit does not. In the soft-focus background a young bear and a young deer keep playing basketball.

pages.narration: 吃完饼干，水水想起公园里还有滑梯。她坐着滑下来，又趴着滑下来，笑声像小铃铛。
pages.composition_hint: A colorful playground slide with bright plastic side rails and a smooth blue sliding surface, shuishui sliding down happily, a red panda standing at the bottom watching, the pink-and-lavender basketball resting near the soft play mat.

pages.narration: 正要再滑一次，滑梯上面来了几个大哥哥。他们挤在滑梯口，笑着闹着，路被挡住了。
pages.composition_hint: SIDE VIEW of a colorful playground slide, camera facing the slide from the side so we see its full shape. shuishui (white rabbit) stands UP ON THE TOP PLATFORM of the slide, face to face with a couple of slightly bigger kids who are crowding and playfully horsing around at the top of the slide, blocking the way — the bigger kids are a friendly young BROWN BEAR and a young DEER (NOT red pandas), cheerful and not scary, just rowdy. Down on the ground below, ONE red panda stands looking up at shuishui on the platform (his face seen in profile / three-quarter). Warm sunny playground, light and friendly mood.

pages.narration: 水水吸了一口气，小手叉在腰上。她的声音又清楚又勇敢。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 你们快走开！我要滑滑梯啦！

pages.composition_hint: shuishui standing with paws on hips and a brave expression at the slide entrance, a young bear and a young deer stepping aside with friendly smiles, a red panda clapping near the bottom of the colorful slide.

pages.narration: 回家的路上，爸爸选了一条新修的红色小道。水水坐在小摩托前面，一路开心地唱歌。
pages.composition_hint: A freshly paved RED pathway with a white center dividing line and colorful square arch gates overhead. shuishui (white rabbit) sits on the front child-seat of a pastel step-through scooter and sings happily, ONE red panda rides behind her, both wearing small helmets, the pink-and-lavender basketball in the front basket. Any other passers-by in the scene are anthropomorphic ANIMAL characters (e.g. small rabbits, bears, cats) — absolutely NO real humans / NO human people anywhere in the image.

pages.narration: 半路上，他们遇见了对门的安安和棕熊阿姨。安安也在散步，慢慢地挥挥小手。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 安安你好！我今天拍了二十下球！

pages.composition_hint: On a freshly paved RED pathway with a white center line and colorful square arch gates overhead, shuishui (white rabbit) sits on the front child-seat of a pastel step-through scooter and waves a paw, ONE red panda rides behind her (only a single red panda in the whole image, do not duplicate him), the pink-and-lavender basketball in the front basket. Walking toward them and greeting are TWO clearly BROWN BEAR characters: a small fuzzy brown BEAR CUB toddler and a taller adult BROWN BEAR beside him — both are brown bears with round ears, NOT red pandas and NOT rabbits.

pages.narration: 到家啦！水水一进门，就把今天的事讲给妈妈听：拍球、传球、看比赛、滑滑梯，还有那一句勇敢的话。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 我拍了二十下，还自己请大哥哥让开啦！

pages.composition_hint: A cozy apartment living room at sunset, shuishui animatedly acting out dribbling beside the pink-and-lavender basketball, an adult white rabbit in a yellow flower dress listening warmly on the sofa, a red panda placing two small helmets on a shelf.
